positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mythical forest landscape viewed through a geometrically patterned window. The central elements feature silhouetted, interconnected flora (ferns, mushrooms, glowing toadstools) intertwined with subtle celestial motifs (crescent moons, constellations). The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e), rendered with sharp, clean lines and high contrast. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and gold foil accents. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, optimized for apparel printing. Studio lighting, highly detailed, vector art quality, minimal gradients.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, poor anatomy, lowres, grain, noise, jpeg artifacts, muted colors, gradient, cartoonish, photorealism, dirty, messy
